Carcosa Outfitters season one, an edit

104 pieces · five files · Louisiana, 1995–2012 · updated July 2026

Step into the flat circle

True Detective, season one, bought carefully. The case file, the detective's kit, and the Louisiana that swallowed them: sulfur, cedar, chicory, and bone. Every link goes straight to the retailer.

Exhibit A · CID Exhibit B · CID Exhibit C · CID Exhibit D · CID

Explore the evidence

File I The Case File 7 pieces File II The Detective's Kit 24 pieces File III Carcosa 25 pieces File IV The Bayou 22 pieces File V The Wardrobe 26 pieces

Det. R. Cohle, Louisiana CID

The record

True Detective™ and HBO are trademarks of their respective owners. File I is the on-the-nose material. Files II through V are the world around it, not licensed product.

Prices and stock come from Channel3 and drift like everything else; confirm at the retailer.

The arrangement

Links are monetized. When you buy through one, this site earns a commission. Nothing is ever over.
